decision: Refactor scope is src/App.jsx only; static/ legacy standalone is left untouched.
rationale: static/ is dead code w.r.t. the deployed Vite build (index.html loads /src/main.jsx).

decision: Move BAI_1..15 to per-lesson JS modules keeping import { C }; no lesson content changes.
rationale: Data references JS color tokens (C.teal etc.); JSON would force lossy hex conversion.

decision: Write automated smoke tests rendering all 15 lessons before splitting; tests are the regression net.
rationale: Repo has no tests; a refactor this size needs a mechanical safety net first.

decision: Adopt role-based layout: src/data/lessons, src/components/ui, src/components/blocks, src/components/Figure.jsx, src/lib; App.jsx keeps shell+navigation and default export.
rationale: User wants clearly reusable components; role separation is familiar and durable for React.
